Container.Name: ACE-Step-Studio
Container.Overview: Lightweight frontend UI for ACE-Step, a music generation AI. Configure it to connect to your ACE-Step backend and access the studio from your browser.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port the Studio UI will be accessible on.

Config.Name: ACE_STEP_PROTOCOL
Config.Description: Protocol used to reach the ACE-Step backend (http or https).

Config.Name: ACE_STEP_HOST
Config.Description: IP address or hostname of the ACE-Step backend.

Config.Name: ACE_STEP_PORT
Config.Description: Port the ACE-Step backend is listening on.

Config.Name: ACE_STEP_BASE_PATH
Config.Description: Optional base path if ACE-Step is hosted under a sub-path.
